majors.count_method: counted bachelor-level program titles from Clemson's official Program Finder with the Bachelor's Degree filter enabled
majors.notes: titles extracted from Clemson's official Program Finder using the Bachelor's Degree filter; undeclared preprofessional entries and non-bachelor credentials were excluded from the title list

admissions.application_platform: Clemson Application, Coalition Application, or Common Application
admissions.testing_policy: Clemson has adopted a test-optional policy. Applicants are not required to submit SAT or ACT scores to be considered for admission, but if they want scores used in review, Clemson requires official scores sent electronically by the testing agency.
admissions.gpa_policy: Clemson reviews GPA, class rank, and course rigor, but the cited official admissions pages do not state a minimum GPA requirement.
admissions.course_rigor: Clemson says one of the clearest indicators of fit is academic performance in high school and that it examines GPA, class rank, and the rigor of classes taken. It also says most applicants present college-preparatory, honors, and AP coursework based on what their high school offers.
admissions.recommendations: Clemson does not require letters of recommendation for admission, but applicants may upload letters of recommendation as optional supplemental materials in the Clemson admissions portal after submitting the application.
admissions.essays: Clemson does not require the SAT or ACT essay, and it says personal statements and other supplemental materials are optional rather than required for admission.

evidence.claim: Dr. Lisa Sams Ebner is among the founding faculty of the Harvey S. Peeler Jr. College of Veterinary Medicine, shaping curriculum and helping set the vision for South Carolina's next generation of veterinarians.
evidence.source_excerpt: Dr. Lisa Sams Ebner is among the founding faculty of the Harvey S. Peeler Jr. College of Veterinary Medicine, shaping curriculum and helping set the vision for South Carolina's next generation of veterinarians.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 5 professors from RateMyProfessors by rating count and sentiment metrics.
evidence.source_excerpt: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'Clemson University' (legacyId=242) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 10 notable alumni from Wikipedia-derived candidate lists using trailing pageviews.
evidence.source_excerpt: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.

evidence.claim: Clemson Application, Coalition Application, or Common Application
evidence.source_excerpt: Apply to Clemson as a First-Year Student ... Clemson Application, Coalition Application, Common Application

evidence.claim: Clemson has adopted a test-optional policy. Applicants are not required to submit SAT or ACT scores to be considered for admission, but if they want scores used in review, Clemson requires official scores sent electronically by the testing agency.
evidence.source_excerpt: Clemson has adopted a test-optional policy. Applicants are not required to submit a standardized test score to be considered for admission to Clemson. If a student chooses that test scores should be used, the scores must be submitted electronically by the respective testing agency.

evidence.claim: Clemson reviews GPA, class rank, and course rigor, but the cited official admissions pages do not state a minimum GPA requirement.
evidence.source_excerpt: We examine your GPA, class rank and the rigor of the classes you took to gauge your ability to rise to academic challenges.

evidence.claim: Clemson says one of the clearest indicators of fit is academic performance in high school and that it examines GPA, class rank, and the rigor of classes taken. It also says most applicants present college-preparatory, honors, and AP coursework based on what their high school offers.
evidence.source_excerpt: One of the clearest indicators of your fit at Clemson is your academic performance in high school. We examine your GPA, class rank and the rigor of the classes you took ... Most of our applicants have competitive GPAs and present transcripts with college preparatory, honors and AP coursework based on what is offered by their high school.

evidence.claim: Clemson does not require letters of recommendation for admission, but applicants may upload letters of recommendation as optional supplemental materials in the Clemson admissions portal after submitting the application.
evidence.source_excerpt: After submitting the application, students can upload supplemental materials such as personal statements, letters of recommendation and resumes in their Clemson admissions portal. Clemson does not require any of these additional materials for admission.

evidence.claim: Clemson does not require the SAT or ACT essay, and it says personal statements and other supplemental materials are optional rather than required for admission.
evidence.source_excerpt: Clemson does not require the SAT or ACT essay. ... students can upload supplemental materials such as personal statements, letters of recommendation and resumes ... Clemson does not require any of these additional materials for admission.

warnings: Phase 5 auto-enrichment completed using official-school web crawl heuristics; manual spot-checking is still recommended for edge cases.
GPA policy was normalized from absence of an explicit minimum-GPA statement on the cited official pages.
School-people enrichment uses public third-party sources (RateMyProfessors and Wikipedia/Wikimedia), so rankings are heuristic rather than official university data.
Clemson majors titles were manually repaired from the official Program Finder using the Bachelor's Degree filter.
Clemson testing, rigor, recommendation, and essay guidance were manually repaired from official undergraduate admissions pages.

popular_professors.ranking_basis: RateMyProfessors entries sorted by rating_count desc, then average_rating desc, then would_take_again_percent desc.
popular_professors.source_summary: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'Clemson University' (legacyId=242) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Wikipedia list/category candidates ranked by trailing-365-day Wikipedia pageviews.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.
